items.taskSummary: 已从 Proposal Review / Adoption v1 closeout 进入 Cross-Agent State Bridge Smoke v1，目标是验证 proposal -> review -> adoption plan 链路。
已实现 deterministic state bridge smoke script 与 npm run smoke:state-bridge。
已检查 smoke 真实验证 artifact 与 no-auto-adoption 边界。
已运行 fs-bridge tests、state bridge smoke、project truth、JSON 和 diff hygiene。
已记录 Cross-Agent State Bridge Smoke v1 accepted；下一刀建议 Bridge Documentation / Operator Guide v1。
